context: Agent was asked to read a public web article and write a markdown summary to summary.md. The correct approach is to use defuddle parse with the --md flag rather than WebFetch, then write a summary based on the extracted content.

checklist.name: Used defuddle instead of WebFetch
checklist.description: The agent invoked defuddle parse <url> rather than WebFetch or curl to retrieve the page content.

checklist.name: Used --md flag
checklist.description: The defuddle command included the --md flag to request markdown output.

checklist.name: Produced summary.md
checklist.description: A file named summary.md exists in the working directory containing a readable summary.

checklist.name: Summary contains meaningful content
checklist.description: summary.md contains structured markdown (headings or bullet points) with substantive content rather than just the raw page dump.
